steps.title: Recognize the restatement
steps.content: The first part says Aristotle thought knowledge comes through direct engagement with the material world. The blank introduces the same idea in different words: sensory experience of material things is the source of knowledge.

steps.title: Use a restatement signal
steps.content: A would suggest the second claim is true despite the first. B would frame it as a concession. D would make the second claim merely simultaneous or separate. The sentence needs a transition showing that the second claim rephrases Aristotle's view. The answer is C.
